title: Widdop Milestones Mirror Border Photo Frame Age 18 - Photo Frame For Birthdays - Aperture 6" x 4" - Stylish Design Gift For Birthday Picture Frame
features: Celebrate the monumental occasion of an 18th birthday with this exquisite mirror border photo frame.
Crafted from high-quality glass material, this frame features a sleek silver design that adds a touch of sophistication to any space.
The aperture size of 15cm x 10cm beautifully showcases a cherished photo capturing the essence of this special milestone.
With a frame size of 22cm x 17cm, this piece is ideal for displaying on a tabletop or hanging on a wall to adorn any room with its radiant presence.
Designed and crafted by Widdop, this frame serves as a timeless keepsake to cherish the joyous memories of this significant milestone.
description: Product Description Celebrate milestones with style Elegant glass photo frame for milestone birthdays Mark a truly special birthday—whether it’s a sweet 16 or a proud 90—with this elegant glass photo frame by Widdop. Featuring a mirror border, stylish silver number detail, and a 6" x 4" aperture, it's a beautiful way to showcase a cherished memory. Ideal for gifting or personal keepsakes. Stylish mirrored finish The sleek mirror border adds a sophisticated, modern touch that complements any décor or celebration setting. Perfect milestone gift Whether it’s a 16th or 90th birthday, this frame makes a thoughtful, personal gift to celebrate a special moment. Display with pride Freestanding with a sturdy easel back, it’s ideal for placing on a mantelpiece, shelf or desk to honour the big day. Premium glass frame Crafted from quality materials by Widdop, this frame is built to preserve precious memories for years to come.
